title: Build My Week
prompt_text: Act as my executive coach. Based on these goals [insert goals], build a weekly plan with top 3 priorities, calendar blocks, and likely obstacles.
why_it_works: Creates a structured plan instead of vague to-dos.
how_to_customize: Swap in your role and weekly goals.
expected_output: A weekly plan with priorities and time blocks.

title: Launch a Microbusiness
prompt_text: Give me 5 low-cost business ideas I can start based on my skills [insert skills], local market [insert market], and budget [insert budget]. Rank by speed to first revenue.
why_it_works: Pushes the model toward practical, constrained ideas.
how_to_customize: Add budget, city, and time available.
expected_output: Ranked list of realistic business ideas.

title: Inbox Zero Reply Assistant
prompt_text: Rewrite this email into a concise, professional response with a clear ask, next steps, and subject line: [paste email].
